_comment_purpose: Calibrated HSV values for the scan refactor colour heuristics. Source of truth for scan/colors.py. Edit values here, scan/colors.py picks them up at import time. The Python module keeps an embedded fallback identical to this file so the project still boots if the JSON is missing or malformed.
_comment_axes: All values are HSV in [0, 1]. Hue is circular: distances between hues use min(|h1-h2|, 1 - |h1-h2|) so 0.99 and 0.01 are 0.02 apart, not 0.98.
_comment_convergence: rarity_colors_hsv and age_colors_hsv currently share the same H/S/V triples at corresponding positions because the in-game tier progression and age progression now use the same colour ramp. This is intentional — both tables are kept separate so the future game re-skin can diverge them without code changes.
_comment_thresholds: STRAT A -> STRAT B switcher (cf. SCAN_REFACTOR.txt §3 / §8.V3). hsv_ambiguity_threshold is a DISTANCE (0 = perfect, ↑ = worse) — never compare it with a hybrid match score (0..1, ↑ = better).
